author: kevaundray
content:
**L1-zkEVM Breakout Call #02**

Starting: March 11, 2026, 15:00 UTC

**Location:** https://ethereumfoundation.zoom.us/j/81023492247?pwd=xdDpTCna7IdyWOmYTQNmwI2svBTOBT.1

**Agenda**

- Presentation from TamaGo maintainer on removing A and D extensions
- Project updates
- Short presentation from Ignacio on Project 6
- Q&A

**Notable** 

 - ELs and guest programs should now be able to use EEST to test compliance
 - List of agreed upon zkVM standards and their status
 - Open source cluster implementations blocking benchmarking
